Game.Name: Hissatsu Pachinko Collection 2 (Japan)
Game.plot: Hissatsu Pachinko Collection 2 is a Miscellaneous game, published by SunSoft,which was released in Japan in 1995.
Game.Notes: Hissatsu Pachinko Collection 2 ("Sure-Fire Pachinko Collection 2") is a pachinko simulation game from SunSoft and part of their Hissatsu Pachinko Collection series on the Super Famicom, of which this is the second game of four. The game adopts a familiar format of having the player start in their apartment and move around the city's pachinko parlors to make a fortune on the machines. Each machine has different tricks associated to payouts, and it's down to the player to find and exploit them.
